text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Symboli Rudolf's racing debut is
upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the early hour, the venue is electric. The
atmosphere feels more like a graded race than a
simple debut.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah! The race hasn't even begun, and I can feel
the crowd's excitement from here.
choice_data_list: You're the one they're waiting for.
You're the one they're waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. All eyes are on me, perhaps more now
than there ever will be.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Only today are they free to wonder how I
measure up to the title of Emperor. Once I take
to the track, I'll become a known quantity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That means my performance today is crucial.
Anything less than the best will disappoint them.
choice_data_list: That sounds like a lot of pressure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Surely you know better than that. Who do you
take me for?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If anything, I see this as an opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If the crowd is this excited before they've even
seen me run, imagine the fame we'll enjoy if I
account for myself well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, worry not. Or rather, I should say... I will not
let you down.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today we take the first step on our road of
conquest.
